page_content:
MUSC490 Conducting (2 Credits)

Vocal and instrumental baton techniques. Prerequisite: MUSC251.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 811

MUSC491 Conducting II (2 Credits)

Baton techniques applied to score reading, rehearsal techniques, tone production, style and interpretation.

Prerequisite: MUSC490; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
